html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Hepatitis B.Delayed start schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: First hepatitis B dose was administered
Second hepatitis B dose was administered
Third hepatitis B dose was administered. The primary series has been completed

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Hepatitis B.Delayed start schedule table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: First hepatitis B dose was administered
